title: pelargonium × pulchrum
intro: Pelargonium × pulchrum, also known as Rose-scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive rose-like fragrance and attractive foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pulchrum include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
